generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance DS18S20InsideSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer with unique 64‑bit ID, mounted inside the incubator (location 1)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataFromInsideSensor1
]

instance DS18S20InsideSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer with unique 64‑bit ID, mounted inside the incubator (location 2)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataFromInsideSensor2
]

instance DS18S20AmbientSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1‑Wire digital thermometer with unique 64‑bit ID, measuring ambient room temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataFromAmbientSensor
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance TemperatureDataFromInsideSensor1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20InsideSensor1
]

instance TemperatureDataFromInsideSensor2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20InsideSensor2
]

instance TemperatureDataFromAmbientSensor : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20AmbientSensor
]

// C10: Data (measurement data)
instance TemperatureMeasurementInside1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature reading (°C) from inside sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataFromInsideSensor1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EdgeComputeController
]

instance TemperatureMeasurementInside2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature reading (°C) from inside sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataFromInsideSensor2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EdgeComputeController
]

instance TemperatureMeasurementAmbient : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient room temperature reading (°C) from external sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataFromAmbientSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EdgeComputeController
]

// C2: Acting components
instance HeatBedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Resistive heat‑bed (214 mm × 214 mm × 3 mm) driven via MOSFET switch on custom PCB, on/off heating signal"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12 V/24 V circulation fan driven via MOSFET on custom PCB, on/off speed control"
]

// C10: Models (thermal dynamics)
instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Two‑parameter thermal model (V·I·Δt and G_box) predicting incubator air temperature"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalSimulationEngine
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Four‑parameter thermal model (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) predicting air and heater temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThermalSimulationEngine
]

// C11: Enablers (software / middleware)
instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AMQP RabbitMQ message broker on Raspberry Pi, transports PT‑to‑DT temperature messages"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EdgeComputeController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (Linux, Wi‑Fi/BLE) runs low‑level driver, ingests sensor data, issues actuator commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService,
                     ModelCalibrationService,
                     TemperaturePredictionService,
                     HeatingDurationOptimizationService
]

instance SciPyCalibrationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python SciPy non‑linear least‑squares optimizer used for calibrating Model A and Model B parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance PythonOptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python optimisation tooling (SciPy) for determining optimal heating (H) and waiting (C) durations"
    DTDFVocab:enables HeatingDurationOptimizationService
]

instance ThermalSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python‑based thermal simulation engine executing Model A and Model B for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureSimulationService,
                     TemperaturePredictionService
]

// C6: Services
instance TemperatureSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates incubator temperature dynamics using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates model parameters (C_air, G_box, etc.) via non‑linear least‑squares optimisation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors live temperature streams, detects violations of predefined temperature limits"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureLimitViolationInsight,
                     ActivateHeatBedAction,
                     SetFanSpeedAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts future temperature trajectories based on current state and selected model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance HeatingDurationOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimises heating duration H and waiting duration C for safe operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatingDurationAdjustmentInsight,
                     AdjustHeatingDurationAction,
                     AdjustWaitingDurationAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance TemperatureLimitViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detects when measured temperature exceeds or drops below safe limits"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides calibrated parameter values (C_air, G_box, etc.) after optimisation"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature profile for the next time horizon based on the selected model"
]

instance HeatingDurationAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommends adjusted heating (H) and waiting (C) durations to maintain target temperature"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustHeatingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to modify the heating duration H on the controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustWaitingDurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to modify the waiting duration C on the controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActivateHeatBedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Turn on/off the heat‑bed via MOSFET driver"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SetFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set fan speed (on/off) via MOSFET driver"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C3: Environment (physical assembly)
instance IncubatorBox : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HeatBedActuator,
                 FanActuator,
                 DS18S20InsideSensor1,
                 DS18S20InsideSensor2,
                 DS18S20AmbientSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "DT components subscribe to the RabbitMQ broker and send control commands (heat‑bed ON/OFF, fan ON/OFF) back to the controller, which then actuates the MOSFET switches to affect the PT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT architecture comprises a RabbitMQ communication server, a low‑level driver that abstracts sensor/actuator I/O, a controller implementing a bang‑bang‑like algorithm with limits (LL, UL) and timing parameters (H, C), and external DT components that listen to the message bus to run simulations, perform calibration, and generate monitoring alerts."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through uniform‑temperature experiments (comparing three sensor readings) and through calibration that minimises the least‑squares error between measured and simulated temperature trajectories; residual errors are reduced via gradient‑descent optimisation. Assumptions (uniform air temperature, negligible wall heat storage, constant air specific heat) are explicitly tested and documented."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual and virtual‑to‑physical data exchange occurs over the RabbitMQ message broker using the AMQP protocol over the Raspberry Pi's network interfaces (Wi‑Fi or Ethernet)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components (RabbitMQ server, low‑level driver, controller, and simulation/calibration services) are hosted on the same Raspberry Pi 4 hardware that also controls the incubator."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The low‑level driver incorporates a safe protocol to keep the device in a safe state, and the controller monitors temperature limits (LL, UL) to prevent overheating; safety monitoring is part of the DT's runtime checks."
]
